invariants.name: bpb_decreases_with_real_gradient
invariants.description: BPB monotonically decreases when real MSE gradient flows through encoder embeddings
invariants.trinity_link: 7-step derivation of alpha_phi: zero assumptions, one number

runtime_check.message: INV-1 VIOLATED: BPB not decreasing — real backward pass required (TASK-5D)

invariants.name: asha_champion_survives
invariants.description: ASHA with threshold >= 3.5 never prunes the champion trial during warmup
invariants.trinity_link: Monte Carlo p<0.001: threshold significance derived from phi^2+phi^-2=3

runtime_check.message: INV-2 VIOLATED: ASHA pruning threshold too aggressive — champion will be killed

invariants.name: gf16_safe_domain
invariants.description: GF16 quantization error < phi^-6 ≈ 0.055 when d_model >= 256
invariants.trinity_link: Lucas closure: phi^2n + phi^-2n in Z — phi is the ONLY quadratic irrational with integer tower

runtime_check.message: INV-3 VIOLATED: GF16 requires d_model >= 256 (Law L-R9), error would exceed phi^-6

bands.certified_band: phi^-6 error bound — Admitted, pending coq-interval proof
bands.note: empirical_band and certified_band coexist — do NOT merge into one constant

invariants.name: nca_entropy_stability
invariants.description: NCA loss entropy stays in [1.5, 2.8] iff K=9=3^2 states on 9x9=81=3^4 grid
invariants.trinity_link: A5 mechanism: E8 symmetry -> entropy band is a physical phenomenon, not a tuned parameter

runtime_check.message: INV-4 VIOLATED: NCA entropy outside [1.5, 2.8] — K=9 grid 9x9 required (Law L-R11)

invariants.name: lucas_closure_gf16
invariants.description: GF16 arithmetic is algebraically consistent: phi^2n + phi^-2n in Z for all n, same closure as GF(2^4)
invariants.trinity_link: Lucas closure property — Section 3 of Trinity paper, machine-verified

runtime_check.message: INV-5 VIOLATED: GF16 arithmetic inconsistency detected — algebraic closure broken

numeric_anchor.comment: GF(2^4) — same algebraic closure structure as phi^2n sequence

enforcement.l_r14: All 5 Coq invariants must compile (coqc) before race starts — RACE INVALID otherwise
enforcement.admitted_policy: Admitted invariants are blocking in CI but marked as unproven — do NOT mask as proven
